name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Flagship skill development scheme of India. Provides free short-term skill training in 300+ job roles across 37+ sectors.
benefits: Free skill training, certification, and cash reward of ₹500 on course completion.
deadline: Ongoing — multiple batches throughout the year

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Promotes apprenticeship training by sharing 25% of stipend paid by employers. Helps students learn while earning.
benefits: Government shares 25% of apprentice stipend (up to ₹1,500/month). Industry training + certification.

name: PM Scholarship Scheme for RPF/RPSF
description: For wards of RPF/RPSF personnel. Provides scholarships for graduation and higher technical/professional education.
benefits: ₹2,250/month for boys, ₹3,000/month for girls for up to 5 years.

name: Vidya Lakshmi Education Loan Scheme
description: Single window system for students to apply for education loans from multiple banks. Covers tuition, hostel, books, and other expenses.
benefits: Education loans up to ₹1.5 crore from multiple banks. Subsidized interest under CSIS for income < ₹4.5 lakh.

name: NSFDC Educational Loan (SC Students)
ministry: National Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation
description: Low-interest education loan for SC students pursuing professional/vocational courses. Interest rate as low as 4%.
benefits: Loans at 4% interest per annum for SC students. Up to ₹10 lakh for India, ₹20 lakh for abroad.

name: Skill India Mission — DGET Free Training
description: Free vocational training in ITIs and training centers across India under Skill India Mission. Over 100+ trades.
benefits: Free training, tools kit, and job placement assistance in 100+ ITI trades.

name: Udaan Scheme for J&K Students
description: Special coaching scheme for meritorious students of J&K for JEE/NEET preparation. Fully funded residential coaching.
benefits: Free coaching, accommodation, books, and study material for IIT-JEE/NEET preparation.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises.
benefits: Composite loan (term loan + working capital) of ₹10 lakh - ₹1 crore at subsidized rates.

name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojana (Bihar)
description: Bihar state scheme providing incentives to girl students at every education milestone from birth to graduation.
benefits: ₹25,000 on 12th pass, ₹50,000 on graduation. Plus benefits at birth, 1 year, school enrollment stages.
deadline: Ongoing — apply after passing each stage

name: Dr. Ambedkar Post-Matric Scholarship for EBC Students
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: For Economically Backward Class students who don't belong to SC/ST/OBC but have very low income.
benefits: Tuition fee, maintenance allowance, book allowance.

name: National Fellowship for SC Students (UGC)
description: Fellowship for SC students pursuing M.Phil and Ph.D from recognized universities. Full-time research support.
benefits: JRF ₹37,000/month for 2 years, SRF ₹42,000/month for 3 years. Plus annual contingency grant.

name: PM Scholarship for Paramilitary Forces & Railway Protection Force
description: For wards and widows of CRPF, BSF, ITBP, CISF, SSB, NSG personnel pursuing professional courses.
